title: wrightia laevis
intro: Wrightia laevis, also known as the smooth Wrightia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. It is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine, valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues and as an expectorant. The plant's leaves and roots are rich in compounds with anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, providing relief from coughs, colds, and other respiratory ailments. In herbal preparations, Wrightia laevis is often used to make decoctions, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its health benefits, including reducing fever and promoting overall well-being.
